name: Fudgy Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy saucepan, melt 1 cup chocolate chips with butter, stirring constantly.
2. Beat the egg with sugar, brown sugar, and vanilla until creamed.
3. Mix in the melted chocolate.
4. Stir flour with baking soda, baking powder, and salt together.
5. Combine milk with lemon juice until thickened.
6. Add dry ingredients to chocolate mixture alternately with milk.
7. Stir in nuts and remaining cup of chocolate chips.
8. Chill dough.
9. Drop by teaspoon onto an ungreased baking sheet.
10. Bake at 350°F for 8-10 minutes.
11. Cool on a rack.
